auth.signIn: Sign in to manage your account
auth.title: net2phone Settings
auth.tokenHint: Find it in DevTools → Application → Local Storage → n2p_refresh_token at app.net2phone.com
auth.invalidGrant: Password login is not enabled — paste a refresh token below.

concierge.title: The Concierge
concierge.subtitle: AI Onboarding Assistant
concierge.resetConfirm: Reset onboarding? This cannot be undone.

welcome.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid website URL.

verification.loadHolidaysPrompt: Should I auto-load public holidays into your schedule?

cdr.askTitle: Have a CDR from your previous provider?
cdr.askBodyMain: Do you have a Call Detail Record (CDR) from your previous provider?
cdr.askBodySub: A 2–3 day export helps me identify your agents, phone numbers, call patterns, and recommend the best setup. Most providers can export this as a CSV.
cdr.askDescription: A Call Detail Record (2–3 days average) lets me analyze your call patterns and suggest the best setup for your welcome menu, ring groups, and after-hours routing.
cdr.dropZoneText: Drag & drop your CDR file here, or click to browse
cdr.dropZoneHint: Supports CSV files exported from most phone providers
cdr.rerunNote: You can re-run onboarding later once you have the CDR.
cdr.waitMessage: No CDR yet? That's fine — I can guide you through setup manually. You can always import a CDR later.
cdr.analyzingDescription: I'm reading your call records to identify your team, phone numbers, and call patterns.

porting.decideQuestion: Do you have existing numbers to port to net2phone?
porting.portingDescription: Porting transfers your current phone numbers. It takes 2–4 weeks and requires your provider's account details and a signed Letter of Authorization.
porting.yesPort: Yes, I have numbers to port
porting.foundNumbers: I found {count, plural, one {this number} other {these numbers}} on your website — want to port {count, plural, one {it} other {them}} to net2phone?
porting.portingTimeNote: Porting typically takes 2–4 weeks. Select a date at least 2 weeks out.
porting.billAddressNote: Must match the address on your current phone bill.
porting.numbersQueued: {count} {count, plural, one {number} other {numbers}} queued for porting
porting.loaDescription: You must sign the LOA to authorize the number transfer. Opens in a new tab.
porting.loaEmailNote: You'll receive an email with the LOA link shortly.

users.howToAdd: How would you like to add your team?
users.missingEmails: Fill in all email addresses to continue
users.missingEmailsCount: {count} {count, plural, one {user needs} other {users need}} an email address. Click the cell to fill it in.
users.takenError: This email is already registered. Use a different one.

architecture.deptDescription: What departments does your team have? e.g. Sales, Support, Finance
architecture.noDeptsNote: No departments added — all users will be in the default group.
architecture.assignPrompt: Assign each team member to a department:
architecture.phoneTypeQuestion: How will your team make and receive calls?
architecture.softphoneNote: Uses the net2phone mobile/desktop app. No physical phone required.
architecture.hardphoneNote: Physical desk phone. You'll provide MAC addresses.
architecture.bothNote: Mix of desk phones and app users.
architecture.hardphoneDescription: Enter the model and MAC address for each desk phone. You can skip this and add them later.

routing.greetingPlaceholder: Thank you for calling {company}. Press 1 for Sales…
routing.playHoldMessage: Play "Please wait while we connect your call"
routing.ringGroupsDesc: Best for small teams — phones ring simultaneously or in sequence.
routing.callQueuesDesc: Best for higher volume — callers queue and agents answer in order.
routing.scheduleNote: Ring groups are tied to a schedule. Choose an existing schedule or create one.
routing.afterHoursPlaceholder: Thank you for calling. Our office is currently closed…
routing.licenseNotEligible: Your plan does not include Call Queues. Using Ring Groups instead.
routing.licenseOk: Call Queues available on your plan.

blueprint.title: Your Setup Blueprint
blueprint.subtitle: Review everything below before we build it out.

errors.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid website URL.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number (10–15 digits).
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.macInvalid: Please enter a valid MAC address (AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

assistant.title: N2P Assistant
assistant.emptyState: Ask me anything about your net2phone account — team members, call routing, billing, devices, and more.

ringGroups.title: Ring Groups
ringGroups.ringsBeforeEscalation: Rings before escalating to next tier

errors.serverError: Server error — please try again later

voicemailPage.title: Voicemail
voicemailPage.subtitle: Voicemail inbox and messages. You have {count} unread.

teamMembersPage.title: Team Members
teamMembersPage.search: Search by name, email, or extension...

departmentsPage.title: Departments
departmentsPage.callOrderNote: Call order is determined by the members in the Department tab.
departmentsPage.callRecordingDesc: Records all of the department incoming and outgoing calls.
departmentsPage.ruleSeq: Ring 1 Team Member At A Time

virtualAssistantPage.title: Welcome Menus
virtualAssistantPage.playHoldMessage: Play "Please wait while we connect your call"
virtualAssistantPage.dragDropFile: Drag & Drop or click to Browse File

phoneNumbersPage.title: Phone Numbers
phoneNumbersPage.callerIdSubtitle: Customizing the caller ID details for incoming calls to {number} can help you distinguish between calls based on their origin.
phoneNumbersPage.modePrefixDesc: Adds something before the caller ID
phoneNumbersPage.modeSuffixDesc: Adds something after the caller ID
phoneNumbersPage.modeReplaceDesc: Replaces the caller ID with something
phoneNumbersPage.modeNoneDesc: Do not modify the incoming caller ID
phoneNumbersPage.callerIdNameHint: Alphanumeric (A-Z, 0-9) and spaces. No special characters
phoneNumbersPage.callerIdNumHint: Numeric only (0-9) and spaces. No special characters
phoneNumbersPage.noAreaResults: No numbers found for this area code. Try another.
phoneNumbersPage.searchFailed: Failed to search numbers. Please try again.
phoneNumbersPage.changeFailed: Failed to change number. Please try again.

devicesPage.title: Devices
devicesPage.subtitle: Manage all physical devices on your account.

deviceManagementPage.title: Device Management
deviceManagementPage.subtitle: Manage provisioning templates for desk phones.
deviceManagementPage.rebootAllTooltip: Reboot all devices using this template

callBlockingPage.title: Call Blocking
callBlockingPage.subtitle: Manage inbound and outbound block lists.

virtualFaxPage.title: Virtual Fax
virtualFaxPage.subtitle: Manage virtual fax numbers and email routing.

sipTrunkingPage.title: SIP Trunking
sipTrunkingPage.subtitle: Manage SIP trunks, service addresses, and phone numbers.
sipTrunkingPage.noAccount: No SIP trunk account found. Contact your administrator.

schedulesPage.title: Schedules
schedulesPage.subtitle: Define time-based rules for call routing.

webhooksPage.title: Webhooks / API
webhooksPage.subtitle: Receive real-time HTTP POST notifications for account events.
webhooksPage.noWebhooksHint: Add a webhook to start receiving event notifications.
webhooksPage.eventsHint: Select which events should trigger this webhook.
webhooksPage.secretKeyNote: Secret key will be auto-generated once the webhook is added.
webhooksPage.failedToCreate: Failed to create webhook. Please check the URL and try again.

apiSetupPage.title: API Setup
apiSetupPage.subtitle: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access.
apiSetupPage.newKeyBanner: API key created — copy it now!
apiSetupPage.newKeyWarning: This key will not be shown again. Store it somewhere safe.
apiSetupPage.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one above.

voicemailSettingsPage.title: Voicemail Settings
voicemailSettingsPage.subtitle: Configure voicemail notification preferences.
voicemailSettingsPage.sectionSubtitle: Control how voicemail notifications are sent
voicemailSettingsPage.descEmailNotify: Send email when new voicemail arrives

companyDirectoryPage.title: Company Directory
companyDirectoryPage.subtitle: Configure the company directory menu and greeting.
companyDirectoryPage.descEnable: Allow callers to reach the company directory menu
companyDirectoryPage.lookupDescription: Choose how to look up team members in your company. Caller will be asked to enter 3 digits of their first OR last name.

contacts911Page.title: 911 / Emergency Call Notification
contacts911Page.subtitle: Contacts on this list will be notified by SMS when any extension dials 911.
contacts911Page.tooltip: These contacts receive SMS notifications when 911 is dialed from any extension.

emergencySettingsPage.title: Emergency Settings
emergencySettingsPage.subtitle: Contacts notified by SMS when any extension dials 911. Required for Kari's Law compliance.
emergencySettingsPage.karisLawNotice: Kari's Law requires that multi-line telephone systems (MLTS) notify a designated on-site security contact when 911 is dialed. Add the contact numbers below to stay compliant.

numberPortingPage.title: Number Porting
numberPortingPage.subtitle: Port phone numbers from your current provider to net2phone.
numberPortingPage.noRequests: No porting requests yet. Click "New porting request" to start.

bulkOperationsPage.title: Bulk Operations
bulkOperationsPage.subtitle: Bulk import and load operations.
bulkOperationsPage.importDesc: Upload CSV or Excel file for bulk import
bulkOperationsPage.templateDesc: Download a template for bulk import

musicOptionsPage.title: Music Options
musicOptionsPage.subtitle: Upload and manage music-on-hold audio files for your call queues.
musicOptionsPage.aiPowered: Powered by Suno AI · takes ~1 minute
musicOptionsPage.noOptions: No audio files yet. Generate one with AI or upload a file above.
musicOptionsPage.descPlaceholder: e.g. "Upbeat jazz music for a professional phone queue, no vocals"

licensesPage.title: Licenses
licensesPage.subtitle: Active licenses for your account.
licensesPage.contactNote: To add or modify licenses, contact your net2phone account manager.

trustCenterPage.title: Trust Center
trustCenterPage.subtitle: Secure your organization and stay compliant.
trustCenterPage.localNumbersDesc: Register your local numbers to send text messages to US numbers
trustCenterPage.scamDesc: If your phone numbers are flagged due to prior misuse, use the Free Caller Registry to update their ownership details
trustCenterPage.messagingDesc: Here's where you can manage your 10DLC Brand, Campaign, and phone number registrations.
trustCenterPage.ssoDesc: Allow team members to sign into net2phone using their corporate credentials. Enable single sign on for your organization by adding your identity provider below.
trustCenterPage.twoFaDesc: Require 2FA for all users on your account
trustCenterPage.upgradeNote: You need to upgrade to a paid plan before you can register your numbers.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.subtitle: Select a product to manage its settings.

onboardingPage.title: Welcome to net2phone
onboardingPage.subtitle: Get your account fully configured in minutes.
onboardingPage.guidedSetupDesc: The Concierge walks you through every step:
onboardingPage.feature1: Scrapes your website for hours, timezone & numbers
onboardingPage.feature2: Imports your team via CSV or manual entry
onboardingPage.feature4: Submits porting requests for your existing numbers
onboardingPage.assistantTitle: Already set up? Open the Assistant
onboardingPage.assistantDesc: Add users, manage ring groups, pull call stats.

calendarPage.title: Calendar
calendarPage.subtitle: Calendar integration settings. Connect your calendar for availability and scheduling.
calendarPage.sectionDesc: Calendar settings are managed in your profile. Connect Google Calendar, Outlook, or other providers.
calendarPage.notConfigured: Profile settings URL not configured. Contact support for calendar integration.

productPages.agentSubtitle: Configure your AI assistant for calls and messaging.
productPages.agentDesc: The AI Agent is managed in a separate application. Click below to open the Agent portal.
productPages.huddleDesc: Huddle video settings are managed in the Huddle application.
productPages.coachDesc: Coach AI settings are managed in the Coach application.
productPages.ucontactSubtitle: Contact center and workforce management settings.
productPages.ucontactDesc: Contact center settings will be available here. Configure queues, agents, and workforce management.
